name: PASTE 3D Spatial Alignment
description: Align multiple spatial transcriptomics slices into a 3D configuration using PASTE (Probabilistic Alignment of Spatial Transcriptomics Experiments).

alpha.description: Alpha parameter for PASTE alignment, trading off expression similarity and spatial distance

use_highly_variable.description: Whether to use only highly variable genes for alignment

output_config.collection_description: Outputs aligned spatial slice coordinates and transformation mapping.

items.description: AnnData object containing aligned spatial coordinates
Text report containing alignment statistics and optimal transport mapping costs
